name: refarm
description: Refarm — Personal Operating System for sovereign data management

scripts.test:capabilities: pnpm -C packages/storage-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/sync-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/identity-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/task-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/session-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/plugin-manifest run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/storage-sqlite run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/storage-memory run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/storage-rest run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/sync-loro run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/sync-crdt run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/identity-nostr run test:conformance
scripts.gate:smoke:runtime-host-contracts: pnpm --filter @refarm.dev/runtime --filter @refarm.dev/homestead --filter @refarm.dev/sower --filter @refarm.dev/scarecrow --filter @refarm.dev/plugin-courier run build && pnpm --filter @refarm.dev/scarecrow --filter @refarm.dev/plugin-courier run test && pnpm --filter @refarm.dev/app --filter @refarm.me/app run type-check
scripts.gate:smoke:runtime: pnpm run gate:smoke:runtime-host-contracts && cd packages/tractor && cargo check --quiet && cargo test --lib agent_tools_bridge --quiet && cargo test --lib plugin_host --quiet && cargo test --lib wasi_bridge --quiet && pnpm run test:smoke:ws && cd ../.. && pnpm -C packages/tractor-ts run build && pnpm -C packages/tractor-ts run type-check && pnpm -C packages/tractor-ts run runtime-module:ci
scripts.gate:smoke:contracts: pnpm -C packages/storage-contract-v1 run build && pnpm -C packages/storage-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/sync-contract-v1 run build && pnpm -C packages/sync-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/identity-contract-v1 run build && pnpm -C packages/identity-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/task-contract-v1 run build && pnpm -C packages/task-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/session-contract-v1 run build && pnpm -C packages/session-contract-v1 run test:unit && pnpm -C packages/storage-sqlite run build && pnpm -C packages/storage-sqlite run test:conformance && pnpm -C packages/sync-loro run build && pnpm -C packages/sync-loro run test:conformance
scripts.gate:full:colony: pnpm run gate:smoke:foundation && pnpm run gate:smoke:contracts && pnpm run gate:smoke:runtime && pnpm run validate-packages && pnpm run deps:missing:src && pnpm run deps:vitest-config-check && pnpm run actions:pins && pnpm run audience:boundary:test && pnpm run deploy:publish:workflow:test && pnpm run i18n:check && pnpm run i18n:check:test && pnpm run openapi:check && pnpm run refarm:check:gate && pnpm run project:validate --silent
scripts.test:repro: node scripts/ci/run-root-scripts.mjs lint type-check test:unit test:integration test:e2e
scripts.refarm:sidecar:verify: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/farmhand test -- src/transports/http.test.ts src/transports/sessions.test.ts src/transports/plugins.test.ts src/transports/tasks.test.ts --pool=threads && node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/farmhand type-check && node scripts/ci/run-root-scripts.mjs openapi:check
scripts.refarm:driver:tasks:verify: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/farmhand test -- src/transports/tasks.test.ts src/transports/http.test.ts --pool=threads && node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/farmhand type-check && node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm test -- test/commands/tasks.test.ts --pool=threads && node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm type-check && node scripts/ci/run-root-scripts.mjs openapi:check
scripts.refarm:check:gate: pnpm -C packages/health run build && pnpm -C apps/refarm run build && node apps/refarm/dist/index.js check --json
scripts.refarm:check:verify: pnpm -C packages/health run test && pnpm -C apps/refarm exec vitest run test/commands/check.test.ts test/commands/health.test.ts test/commands/doctor.test.ts --pool=threads && pnpm -C apps/refarm run type-check && pnpm run refarm:check:gate
scripts.refarm:health:gate: pnpm -C packages/health run build && pnpm -C apps/refarm run build && node apps/refarm/dist/index.js health --json --fail-on-issues
scripts.refarm:actions:test: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm test -- test/commands/action-affordances.test.ts test/commands/action-fixture.test.ts test/commands/headless.test.ts test/commands/headless-action.test.ts test/commands/actions.test.ts test/commands/status-actions.test.ts test/commands/web.test.ts test/commands/web-actions.test.ts test/commands/tui.test.ts test/commands/tui-actions.test.ts --pool=threads
scripts.refarm:actions:headless:test: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm test -- test/commands/action-fixture.test.ts test/commands/headless.test.ts test/commands/headless-action.test.ts --pool=threads
scripts.refarm:actions:renderers:test: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm test -- test/commands/action-affordances.test.ts test/commands/actions.test.ts test/commands/web.test.ts test/commands/web-actions.test.ts test/commands/tui.test.ts test/commands/tui-actions.test.ts --pool=threads
scripts.refarm:tree:test: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm test -- test/commands/tree.list.test.ts test/commands/tree.show.test.ts test/commands/tree.preview.test.ts test/commands/tree.fork.test.ts test/commands/tree.switch.test.ts test/commands/execution-plan.test.ts --pool=threads
scripts.refarm:tree:type-check: node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/refarm type-check && node scripts/ci/run-workspace-script.mjs apps/farmhand type-check
scripts.refarm:tree:verify: node scripts/ci/run-root-scripts.mjs refarm:tree:test refarm:tree:smoke refarm:tree:type-check refarm:tree:farmhand:test refarm:tree:smoke:cli
scripts.agent:lsp:check: cd packages/tractor && cargo test --lib lsp_bridge --quiet && cargo test --test pi_agent_harness --no-run
scripts.agent:lsp:harness: cd packages/tractor && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_tool_use_dispatched_and_result_fed_back -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_find_references_tool_reads_lsp_locations -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_rename_symbol_tool_updates_workspace_file_via_lsp -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture
scripts.agent:lsp:harness:build: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo component build --release && cd ../.. && pnpm run agent:lsp:harness
scripts.agent:streaming:check: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo check --target wasm32-wasip1 --quiet && cargo test --lib streaming_config --quiet && cargo test --lib provider_runtime_stream_body_gate --quiet && cd ../tractor && cargo check --quiet && cargo test --lib read_sse_data_events_limited --quiet && cargo test --lib complete_http_stream --quiet && cargo test --lib store_stream_agent_response_chunks_from_reader --quiet
scripts.agent:streaming:clients: pnpm -C packages/tractor-ts run type-check && pnpm -C packages/tractor-ts run test:unit -- agent-response-stream.test.ts stream-chunk.test.ts stream-session.test.ts stream-view.test.ts
scripts.agent:streaming:studio: pnpm -C packages/homestead test && pnpm -C packages/homestead run type-check && pnpm -C apps/dev test && pnpm -C apps/dev run type-check
scripts.agent:streaming:harness: cd packages/tractor && cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_streaming -- --ignored --test-threads=1
scripts.agent:streaming:harness:build: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo component build --release -p pi-agent && cd ../.. && pnpm run agent:streaming:harness

overrides.//security-yaml: GHSA-48c2-rrv3-qjmp (yaml <2.8.3 stack overflow) — yaml-language-server@1.20.0 pins yaml@2.7.1 as an EXACT version (no ^ or ~). pnpm overrides cannot intercept exact pins — this is by design. The path-specific override below has no effect on this path. Acknowledged as accepted risk: dev tooling only (@astrojs/check language server, not production runtime). Suppressed via --ignore in security:audit and CI moderate gate. REMOVE BOTH when @astrojs/language-server ships volar-service-yaml>=0.0.71 (uses yaml-language-server@1.23.0 which pins yaml@2.8.3 — a semver range).
overrides.//jco: Pin to single version — dual JCO (root v1.17.3 + tractor-ts v1.19.0) caused trampoline0 redeclaration during pi-agent JCO transpilation (static import in plugin-loader.ts was the trigger, now removed).

//: jest is kept for type-safety/compatibility with certain node_modules in vitest runs
